## 2026-06-19 - Prompt-Based UI Component Accessibility

**Learning:** In purely prompt-based applications like AI skills, UI components (like HTML cards) are generated by the LLM, not from source code. Traditional UI accessibility tests do not apply. Screen readers will fail to read these dynamic cards if accessibility features are omitted.
**Action:** When designing prompts that instruct LLMs to generate UI components, explicit accessibility attributes (e.g., `aria-label`, `role="region"`, `aria-hidden="true"` on decorative elements) must be hardcoded into the prompt's instructions to ensure the resulting output is accessible.
